Zhao Yong и¶ҷиһҚ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Yong (и¶ҷиһҚ). Feared Yuan Shao would be unable to hold confidence of the people after the warlord behaved rudely to Zheng Xuan. Zhao Yong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yuan Shao.
